title: Scope and evidence freeze
validation: DESIGN.md, TODO.md, TASKS.jsonl, CAMPAIGNS.jsonl, WORKSTREAM.json, and CONTEXT.jsonl exist and agree
handoff: DONE. First executable slice is core default-theme expansion.

title: Expand default theme in core
validation: cargo nextest run -p merman-render block_svg class_svg flowchart_svg
handoff: DONE. Default theme expansion populates Mermaid-compatible core variables, preserves overrides, and falls back to default for unknown theme names.

title: Refactor theme derivation helpers
handoff: DONE. Shared theme variable map extraction, default Mermaid font-family value, and mkBorder HSL derivation helper remove duplicated preset boilerplate.

title: Add shared SVG theme resolver
validation: cargo nextest run -p merman-render block_svg class_svg flowchart_svg
handoff: DONE. SvgTheme centralizes common color/font reads for Class, Block, and Flowchart CSS; remaining diagram-specific theme reads stay follow-up scope.

title: Define themeCSS contract
validation: cargo nextest run -p merman --features render svg_pipeline_tests
handoff: DONE. Mermaid themeCSS is supported as diagram-owned CSS scoped to the root SVG id; unsupported top-level at-rules are dropped and Mermaid CSS hash placeholders are restored.

title: Single-source supported themes for API and playground
handoff: DONE. Core, bindings, WASM, @merman/web, playground, share links, history, and Mermaid compare mode agree on default/base/dark/forest/neutral and normalize unknown themes to default.

title: Add representative theme parity fixtures
handoff: SPLIT. Broad theme fixture coverage and full ER/other-diagram resolver migration are follow-up parity work.

title: Close theme parity refactor lane
validation: cargo nextest run -p merman-render block_svg class_svg flowchart_svg
handoff: DONE. Changelog updated; neo/redux themes, broad fixtures, and remaining diagram resolver migrations are explicit follow-ups.

title: Re-align Mermaid 11.15 official theme surface
validation: cargo run -p xtask -- compare-all-svgs --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --filter theme --diagram flowchart --diagram xychart --diagram gitgraph --diagram pie --diagram gantt --diagram architecture --diagram quadrantchart --diagram class --diagram sequence --diagram radar --diagram er --diagram timeline --diagram packet --diagram treemap
handoff: DONE. Core and @merman/web expose only default/base/dark/forest/neutral; snapshot-only neo/redux theme names fall back to default; flowchart neutral named-color edge label background matches Mermaid white.

title: Add ordinary-source theme-selector parity coverage
validation: cargo nextest run -p merman --features render external_site_theme external_snapshot_only_theme
handoff: DONE. Plain-source high-level rendering covers external neutral theme application and external snapshot-only fallback; Flowchart CSS unit tests cover white and unknown edge-label background fades.

title: Continue diagram theme resolver migration
validation: cargo run -p xtask -- compare-all-svgs --check-dom --dom-mode parity-root --dom-decimals 3 --filter theme
handoff: SPLIT. Only migrate diagram-specific theme reads with per-diagram fixture evidence; no forced abstraction is needed for the observed 11.15 playground regression.
